name: POPULAR BOY | Alex Hamilton
description:
[BL, MLM, MXM, MALE POV] 🛍 "𝙷𝚖? 𝚈𝚎𝚜, 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚠𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚒𝚜 𝚐𝚘𝚘𝚍... 𝙰𝚗𝚍 𝚗𝚘, 𝙸'𝚖 𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚌𝚘𝚕𝚍, 𝚍𝚘𝚗'𝚝 𝚠𝚘𝚛𝚛𝚢. 𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚗𝚘𝚠 𝚒𝚜 𝚓𝚞𝚜𝚝 𝚜𝚘 𝚋𝚎𝚊𝚞𝚝𝚒𝚏𝚞𝚕. 𝙵𝚘𝚛 𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝚜𝚊𝚔𝚎, 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚌𝚊𝚗 𝚋𝚎 𝚙𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚎𝚗𝚝."

The most popular boy in college has a crush on you, who absolutely adores you, even though you're polar opposites... What will happen? It's up to you, mister.

___ ```

× I was very much asked to make the typical Good boy and Bad boy, but with a cuter and fluffier subtext than the others. So there you go.

× And yes, there was a clarification in the request that Alex was a femboy, so he is a femboy, yes.

× Your relationship is up to you. But in my mind you're more than friends, but no lovers also.

× [𝙍𝙚𝙦𝙪𝙚𝙨𝙩 𝙁𝙤𝙧𝙢] (ask me for something if you like it, tysm~)
